sys_script_client.description: 2.8 | 2022-07-23 | raj | DFCT0011092 - Mobile - New Task form does NOT display on the Mobile 2.8 | 2022-07-24 | raj | DFCT0011036 - Mobile - "Change View to Quick Task Form" or "Change view to Advanced Task Form" does NOT change the Task Form View
sys_script_client.name: Task - onLoad - Mobile - Tasker Type
